pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of the

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_MO_COINS_1M 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: Plans that use a co-payment amount rather than a coinsurance percentage will not have a value in this 
field; see instead the corresponding co-payment variable called (PRE_ICL_MO_COPAY_1M). 

Starting in 2016, CMS changed how they describe pharmacy networks. The mail order pharmacies are
